title: BYD draws EU scrutiny over labor abuse allegations at Hungary factory
summary_full: BYD has come under scrutiny from European lawmakers after a watchdog report alleged harsh working conditions at its Hungary plant.
summary_public: BYD has come under scrutiny from European lawmakers after a watchdog report alleged harsh working conditions at its Hungary plant.
